tasks.task: Download Auntu and move it into a separate file.
tasks.description: This is a step to organize files and manage space.

tasks.task: Install Auntu on the virtual machine using VMware Player.
tasks.description: The next steps involve setting up the environment for learning about Linux.

tasks.task: Create a new virtual machine in VMware Player and configure settings.
tasks.description: This involves personalizing your operating system installation process.

tasks.task: Configure Auntu's settings, such as user accounts and preferences.
tasks.description: Setting up basic configurations for the virtual machine environment.

tasks.task: Remove unnecessary programs that come with Auntu.
tasks.description: This step is about optimizing the setup by reducing clutter and unneeded software.
